action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Bare, Arney, Kirsch, Anderson, Clancy, DeSmidt, Fitzgerald, Joers, Johnson, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Stroud, Stubbs, Tenorio, Udell, Palmeri and Madison; 
cosponsored by Senators Roys, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Larson, Ratcliff and Spreitzer
